Name: YT Thumbnail-Generator
Description: An application to generate YouTube thumbnails using AI by analyzing content from a Google Sheet, user-uploaded faces, and text prompts.
Usecases (2–3 examples): Bulk thumbnail generation for a content calendar, A/B testing concepts before publishing, consistent branded thumbnails across a channel
Key Differentiators: Google Sheets bulk import, 4 thumbnail “psychology archetypes”, face-sync into cinematic scenes, export compression under 2MB
Tech Stack: TypeScript + React (AI Studio template), Gemini API
What It Proves: Multimodal pipelines, batch creative ops, packaging AI into a product workflow

Name: Ai Character Generator
Description: Upload your character and use AI to reimagine them in any setting, style, or scenario using Gemini's advanced image-to-image generation.
Usecases (2–3 examples): Character concept exploration for games, mascot variations for brand campaigns, story scenes for social content
Key Differentiators: Fast image-to-image reimagining, style + scenario control via prompt, clean single-output flow for iteration
Tech Stack: TypeScript + React (AI Studio template), Gemini image-to-image
What It Proves: Creative direction via prompting, identity/style control, rapid prototyping UX

Name: NanoMem
Description: A powerful meme generator using Gemini Nano Bana (Flash Image) to create, edit, and remix memes with multimodal inputs.
Usecases (2–3 examples): Meme variations for X/Twitter growth, brand reaction memes for communities, remixing meme templates into new formats
Target Users: Community marketers, social teams, meme creators
Key Differentiators: Multimodal remixing, clipboard image paste, 4-variant batch generation, local history of outputs
Tech Stack: TypeScript + React (AI Studio template), Gemini 2.5 Flash Image
What It Proves: High-velocity creative iteration, consumer-grade UX for AI outputs, “content engine” thinking

Name: HairStudio
Description: An ultra-realistic AI headshot generator that allows users to swap hairstyles while maintaining professional facial features.
Usecases (2–3 examples): Headshot refresh before job search, hairstyle previews before salon visits, consistent looks for creator branding
Key Differentiators: Identity preservation while changing hair, “professional realism” constraint, multi-style output for quick selection
Tech Stack: Google AI Studio app, Gemini image model workflow
What It Proves: Controlled editing (not just generation), realism constraints, strong “practical AI utility” product sense

Name: AdFushion
Description: A professional AI marketing image generator that seamlessly integrates reference models and products into high-quality, stylized scenes.
Usecases (2–3 examples): Rapid paid-social creative variations, product lifestyle shots without photoshoots, UGC-style ad mockups for testing hooks
Key Differentiators: Model + product placement in one workflow, high-quality stylized scenes from sparse inputs, outputs designed for fast creative testing loops
Tech Stack: TypeScript + React + Vite (AI Studio template), Gemini API key via env config
What It Proves: Turning multimodal generation into a usable “creative production” tool, performance marketing intuition baked into an app

Name: CineStudio
Description: A professional-grade video prompting and generation tool using Gemini 2.5 Image and Veo 3.1 models for end-to-end creative workflows.
Inputs: Character Image, Location, Other Characters, Object, Prompt
Usecases (2–3 examples): Generate video ad concepts for rapid iterations, cinematic b-roll for landing pages, storyboard-style clips for pitches and product launches
Key Differentiators: Gemini 2.5 + Veo 3.1 pipeline, safe-to-share architecture (no hardcoded keys), production-aware billing requirement handling for Veo models
Tech Stack: TypeScript + React + Vite, Gemini 2.5 + Veo 3.1, AI Studio secure key selector + local env support
What It Proves: End-to-end generative video workflow design, secure API key handling, shipping cutting-edge model capabilities as a product UI

Name: PsiLab
Description: PsiLab is a gamified hybrid web app that allows users to test, train, and improve their psychic and intuitive abilities through scientifically inspired and entertaining challenges.
Inputs: User guesses (cards, shapes, numbers), challenge selections, session history
Usecases (2–3 examples): Daily intuition training sessions, fun party-style “ESP test” challenges, self-tracking progress over time
Key Differentiators: Multiple game modes (Zener cards, shape matching, remote viewing, number precognition), Gemini-powered personalized analysis reports, built with safe API key handling via env vars
Tech Stack: TypeScript + React + Vite, Gemini API (via API_KEY in .env), component-based UI screens
What It Proves: Gamification + experimentation design, interactive UI state management, shipping an AI-enhanced consumer app experience
